governed_answers.buy_to_cover_failure: treated as a fail-closed INTEGRITY_STOP; no silent carry
governed_answers.cost_applied_to_accepted_shorts: 50 bps/yr borrow financing (primary); 300 bps/yr stress; 1000 bps/yr severe diagnostic
governed_answers.failed_entry_one_sided_or_ghost_position: PROHIBITED - a refused short does not create a naked long; portfolio is reconstructed under the preregistered rule below (no ghost/one-sided position)
governed_answers.pending_short_exits: buy-to-cover at next-open t+1 per the frozen execution rule; a pending exit is never dropped
governed_answers.portfolio_fails_or_reconstructed: reconstructed under a preregistered conservative rule (scale the book to the achievable neutral gross), NOT a post-hoc discretionary fix; the exact rule is frozen in the conservative-view spec before validation
governed_answers.refused_delayed_or_resized: REFUSED (fail-closed) in the conservative view; never silently resized to fabricate neutrality
governed_answers.short_cannot_be_located: conservative view: the candidate short is REFUSED (REFUSED_SHORT_UNAVAILABLE) - not synthetically located; primary view: borrow available by assumption (borrow COST applied)
governed_answers.ssr_active: conservative view applies an uptick restriction to the next-session short entry where reconstructable; otherwise disclosed as a limitation
governed_answers.unavailable_short_alters_dollar_neutrali: conservative view: the paired long gross is reduced to preserve dollar-neutrality (long_gross == short_gross) under a preregistered reconstruction rule; it does NOT run one-sided

prohibition: do NOT manufacture historical locate data that does not exist; unobservable facts are labeled UNOBSERVABLE_LIMITATION and disclosed
relation_to_primary_gate: the conservative view is a SECONDARY/ECONOMIC_OPERABILITY_GATE; it changes NO preregistered value and does not redefine net_oos_sharpe >= 0.70

rules.economic_effect: may prevent or resize a short
rules.value: PIT borrow availability is generally not reconstructable for this data tier

rules.data_source: PIT price/ADV/market-cap already in the frozen universe
rules.economic_effect: reduces short breadth in the conservative view
rules.value: shortability proxy = a security is shortable only if it satisfies a preregistered liquidity/size floor at close t (exact floor bound in the conservative-view spec); otherwise REFUSED_SHORT_UNAVAILABLE

rules.economic_effect: delays/blocks some short entries in the conservative view
rules.value: if reconstructable from PIT price (>=10% intraday decline trigger), apply uptick restriction to short entries the following session; else disclose as UNOBSERVABLE_LIMITATION

DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY.label: FRICTIONLESS_SHORT_RESEARCH_DIAGNOSTIC / NOT AN IMPLEMENTABLE PERFORMANCE ESTIMATE
DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY.name: zero-borrow-cost frictionless short attribution

PRIMARY_GATE.name: preregistered net model
PRIMARY_GATE.note: this is the frozen preregistered research test; net_oos_sharpe >= 0.70 is computed on THIS series and MUST NOT move to the conservative view

SECONDARY_GATE_ECONOMIC_OPERABILITY.name: conservative availability/locate/SSR model
SECONDARY_GATE_ECONOMIC_OPERABILITY.role: may BLOCK product promotion; does NOT replace the primary statistical test
